_doc: Metal-side reference for the Metal<->CUDA cross-check. Goldens are injected at runtime from the eval.rs oracle (Metal certified == oracle by tier0_test + pentathlon_test). decode + mtp are from the committed Metal benchmarks (driver/metal/tests). Absolute tok/s are hardware-specific (Apple M1 Max) — the cross-backend claim is the RELATIVE cost ordering + the MTP regime, not absolute numbers.

mtp.speedup_verdict: latency-opt for underutilized GPU; hurts throughput under saturation (2x-verify + head compete for saturated compute)
mtp.note: acceptance is hardware-independent (same model + greedy verify) -> should match CUDA within tol; absolute ms differ by HW but the net-loss regime should hold on both
